scripts.lint: corepack pnpm exec oxlint apps packages --deny-warnings
scripts.lint:fix: corepack pnpm exec oxlint apps packages --fix
scripts.format: corepack pnpm exec oxfmt apps packages
scripts.format:check: corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check apps packages
scripts.check: corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run typecheck
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @flux/tbc-rotation test && corepack pnpm --filter @flux/log-analyzer test
